verses.text: “Sathakte a suah hun ding thei ngei na hi hiam? Sakhite a suah laitakin nau va dom ngei na hi hiam
Tuate a ni ciamtehin, a suah hun ding uh thei na hi hiam
A no suak dingin lei-ah a bawhsuk hun laitak thei na hi hiam
A note gamlakah khangin, a nute kiang pan paikhia-in ciahkik nawnlo uh hi
“Kua in gam-late tungah suahtakna pia ahi hiam? Kua in khahin a ut utin vaksak ahi hiam
Amau' omna dingin gamlak ka pia a, bangmah a po zawhlohna zanglei-ah ka tengsak hi
Gamlumna mun khuapite tawh a kigamla-ah om uh a, kuamah in zualsak zolo a, na semsak zolo uh hi
Mualte tungah an zongin vak kawikawi uh a, nektheih ding singkung lopa a hing peuhpeuh zuan kawikawi uh hi
“Gambawngtal in nangma na hong sem ding ahi hiam? Na ganbukah gambawngtal hong giak nuam ding ahi hiam
Nangmah in khauhual tawh khihzo ding a, na lo-ah na lokhawhna leeng kaisakzo ding na hi hiam
Nasem dingin a hat mahmah hangin, nangma na hong sepsak dingin lamen ngam na hi hiam
Lo-a na anpiangte hong kaihkhop sakin, na ancilna-ah an hong khawm dingin um na hi hiam
“Vasa-kalaohte in a kha uh bangzah takin nawh zap thei ahi hiam! Ahi zongin gun vapi bangin vasa-kalaoh leng theilo hi
Vasa-kalaoh in leilakah a tui nusia a, a tuite a luumsak dingin leilak a ap hi
Mi khatpeuh in a khe tawh a tuite a sikkhap khak ding, gamsa khatpeuh in a sikkhap khak ding, phawk khollo hi
A tuite ama-a' bangin ngaihsun khollo a, ka gimnate a mawkna suakkha ding hi, ci-in lunghimawh lo hi
Amah a hai-in a bawlpa ama tungah pilna a guan'lopa keimah ka hi hi
Ahi zongin a tai ciangin sakol sangin hatzaw hi
“Job aw, sakolte a hatsakpa nang na hi hiam? Sakol zaangmul a posakpa nang na hi hiam
Sakolte kauphe bangin diangsak thei-in, mite' kihtak dingin phitsak thei na hi hiam
Amaute in lawpna tawh a khe-un lei khuat uh a, a thaneih khempeuh uh tawh galsungah a diang uh hi
Amaute in launa meel bangmah theilo uh a, namsau kihta-in nungkik cih zong omlo hi
Amaute' tungah a tuang mite' galhiam, lum leh teite a te zalzal hi
Lawp mahmahna tawh sakolte in mainawt uh a, peengkul a kitum ciangin omkhong theilo uh hi
Peengkul a kitum ciangin ham hathat uh a, gal mai a tun' ma-un gal gimnam za uh a, galkapmangte' thupiakna awging a za uh hi
“Simbung in a kha zalin leitaw lamah a leen'theihna ding nangma kiang panin hong sin ahi hiam
Muvanlai in sang leen'in mualtungah bu a tomna ding nang' thupiakna hong ngak ahi hiam
Suangpi dawnah bu bawl a, suangheeng kawmte phualpi-in nei hi
Tua lai mun panin khuadak kawikawi a, manin a nek ding an a gal et hi
Gan sihna kimkotah musanete kikhawm uh a, a note in sasi a dawn uh hi,” a ci hi.
